name: Quick Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef in a skillet until browned, then drain off excess fat.
2. Add tomato sauce, water, mushrooms, onion flakes, brown sugar, oregano, basil, garlic salt, and marjoram to the skillet.
3. Heat the mixture to boiling, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Serve over hot cooked spaghetti or other pasta.
